name: Menu_Aut_Liq_Bienes
wl_code:
nProcesar is int=0
IF sIdentifier="77" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 77, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 78, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 79, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 80, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 78, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 79, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 80, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="78" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 78, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
ELSE IF sIdentifier="79" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 79, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
ELSE IF sIdentifier="80" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 80, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
END
IF nProcesar=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 78, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado78 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 79, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado79 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 80, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado80 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked


Part 1 › WINDEV window › WIN_Edita_Usuarios › Procedures

289
SIATEC1_IA
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 77, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado78=1 AND nEstado79=1 AND nEstado80=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado78=0 AND nEstado79=0 AND nEstado80=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado78=1 OR nEstado79=1 OR nEstado80=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
END
Local procedure Menu_Aut_Liq_Serv
